positive: Vaporwave synthwave landscape featuring a grid-patterned sunset over a futuristic palm tree silhouette. Neon pink, electric blue, and magenta color scheme. Retro 80s aesthetic, geometric shapes, VHS glitch effect, vaporwave art, highly stylized digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural elements, realistic sky
